reference.domains: (topic reference) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c reference oceReference-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
reference.title: Overview and licenses and functionality

abstract.p: The following licenses are required on the license dongle in the machine:

li.p: Second roll in the drawer license
Print inside and double sided license

section.title: Second roll in the drawer license
section.p: Without the license, media can only be loaded into position 1 in the media drawer
For inside printing, the media is still allowed into position 2, since the media is still fed through the slot for position 1

section.title: Matte print modes license
section.p: With this license, the operator can use the matte print modes. Otherwise only gloss print modes are available
This license is also required to print in Backlit mode.

section.title: Print inside and double sided license
section.p: The license allows printing on the inner side of the media, making double sided prints possible.
Double-sided printing is only guaranteed in Matte modes, otherwise the printed side will stick to the print surface. So, for double-sided printing, it is also required to have a Matte license.

section.title: Licenses & updates
section.p: The Licenses are visible in the Settings Editor (Supports/Licences/Licenses):
Additional licenses can be added in a later stage.

li.p: Install a license received via e-mail.
See Install a license received via e-mail
How to update a license via ORS.
See How to update a license via ORS
